chunks.title: Traders & Builders — New Components
chunks.content:
## New Components to Add at Setup

| Component | Count | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| New land tiles | 24 | Shuffle into base tile stack |
| Goods tokens (Wine) | 9 | Sorted by type in a visible supply |
| Goods tokens (Grain) | 6 | Sorted by type in a visible supply |
| Goods tokens (Cloth) | 5 | Sorted by type in a visible supply |
| Builder figure | 1 per player | Each player takes their color |
| Pig figure | 1 per player | Each player takes their color |
| Drawstring bag | 1 | Optional — use to draw tiles |

## Distribution

- Each player receives **1 builder** and **1 pig** in their color; held in personal supply (not placed at start).
- Goods tokens sit in **three separate face-up piles** (Wine, Grain, Cloth) visible to all.
- The 24 new tiles are **shuffled into the existing base-game tile stack** before drawing begins.

chunks.title: Traders & Builders — Builder, Pig & Goods Quick Reference
chunks.content:
## New Pieces Overview

| Piece | Placed On | Effect | Limit |
|-------|-----------|--------|-------|
| Builder | City or Road | Grants a 2nd tile draw/place when you extend that feature | 1 per player; 1 per feature |
| Pig | Field | Boosts your farmers in that field to 4 pts/city at end-game | 1 per player |
| Goods Token | (supply) | Collected when cities complete; scored at end-game | 20 total: 9 Wine, 6 Grain, 5 Cloth |

---

## Builder

**How to deploy:** Instead of a regular follower, place your Builder in a city or road where you **already have a Knight or Thief**.

**Double-turn trigger:** On any later turn, if the tile you place **extends** the same city or road, immediately draw and place a 2nd tile. You may deploy a follower on the 2nd tile as normal.

**Key restrictions:**
- Cannot be placed on a completed feature.
- Only one Builder per player; only one on any single feature.
- Builder returns to your supply when the feature is scored.

---

## Pig

**How to deploy:** Instead of a regular follower, place your Pig in a field where you **already have a Farmer**.

**Effect:** At end-game, all your Farmers in that field score **4 pts** per completed adjacent city (instead of the standard 3 pts).

**Key restrictions:**
- Pig does not add to your Farmer count for majority purposes.
- Only one Pig per player.

---

## Goods Tiles & Tokens

**Goods symbols** appear on city segments of the 24 new expansion tiles: Wine (grape) · Grain (wheat) · Cloth (fabric)

**Collecting:** When a city with goods symbols is **completed**, the player placing the **completing tile** takes 1 goods token per symbol from the supply.

**End-game scoring:**

| Goods Type | Tokens Available | Bonus for Most |
|------------|-----------------|----------------|
| Wine | 9 | 10 pts |
| Grain | 6 | 10 pts |
| Cloth | 5 | 10 pts |

Ties for most of a type: all tied players score the full **10 pts**.

chunks.title: Traders & Builders — Builder Double Turn
chunks.content:
## Builder Piece

Place the Builder **instead of a regular follower**, onto a city or road where you **already have a Knight or Thief**.

## Double Turn (Builder Trigger)

On any future turn, if **tile 1 you place extends the city or road where your Builder stands**, your turn becomes a double turn:

| Step | Action |
|---|---|
| 1 | Draw & place **tile 1** — must extend the Builder's feature |
| 2 | Optionally deploy a follower on tile 1 |
| 3 | Draw & place **tile 2** — any valid placement |
| 4 | Optionally deploy a follower on tile 2 |
| 5 | Score any completed features from both placements |

Turn ends normally after step 5. Builder returns when the feature it occupies is scored.

## Pig Piece

Place the Pig **instead of a regular follower**, in a field where you **already have a Farmer**. The Pig does **not** trigger a double turn — it only boosts end-game farm scoring.

chunks.title: Traders & Builders — Goods Token Scoring
chunks.content:
## Goods Tokens (Wine / Grain / Cloth)

When a city containing goods symbols is **completed**, the player placing the completing tile takes 1 goods token per symbol.

- Tokens are **not scored immediately** — held until end-game.
- At end-game, the player with the **most tokens of each type** scores **10 pts**.
- **Ties:** all tied players score the full 10 pts for that type.

| Goods Type | End-Game Bonus (majority) |
|---|---|
| Wine | 10 pts |
| Grain | 10 pts |
| Cloth | 10 pts |

Scoring is independent per type — a player can win all three, some, or none.

chunks.title: Traders & Builders — Pig Farm Boost
chunks.content:
## Pig — Farm Scoring Boost

The pig modifies end-game farm scoring **only for its owner's farmers** in the same field.

| Condition | Pts per Completed Adjacent City |
|---|---|
| Farmer — base rule, no pig | 3 pts |
| Farmer in same field as **own pig** | **4 pts** |

**Key rules:**
- The pig does **not** count as a follower for majority purposes — only farmers determine field control.
- The boost applies only to the pig owner's farmers, even if other players share the field.
- Majority/tie rules for field control remain unchanged.
